title: AST SpaceMobile Signs 10-Year Deal with STC Group for Middle East Expansion
text: AST SpaceMobile announced a 10-year commercial agreement with stc group to enable direct-to-device satellite mobile connectivity across Saudi Arabia and key regional markets. The agreement includes a prepayment commitment of $175 million from stc group for future services, demonstrating strong customer confidence in ASTS's technology. This partnership extends ASTS's geographic reach beyond Europe and North America into the Middle East, a strategically important market for satellite broadband services. The agreement highlights the growing adoption of ASTS's direct-to-cell technology by major telecommunications operators globally. With partnerships now spanning Europe (Vodafone), North America (AT&T, Verizon, T-Mobile), and the Middle East (STC), ASTS is building a global platform for satellite-to-smartphone connectivity.
